sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif pragmatique + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ 2 (Hachette), Dossier 4 'Médiamania', Leçon 3 (les faits divers; la forme passive; l'accord du participe passé avec le COD). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
